# Bayou Sips
> Bayou Sips rents self-serve frozen drink machines for celebrations and events.

The official website is https://bayousips.com.

## Business Summary
Bayou Sips offers frozen drink machine rentals for event hosts who want a self-serve drink station. The business is based in Ponchatoula, Louisiana (Tangipahoa Parish). The website lets visitors compare three rentals, review flavor choices, and book an event date directly through the booking calendar with full payment upfront.

## Hours
The online booking calendar (Cal.com) accepts reservations 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Phone callbacks and booking-response hours are Monday through Friday, 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM Central Time. Outside those hours, customers can leave a message or send a Facebook message and Bayou Sips will respond the next business day.

## Rental Details
The Mini costs $175 and includes one self-serve cart, one single spout frozen drink machine, one flavor of the customer's choice, and 50 9-ounce plastic cups.

The Original costs $250 and includes one self-serve cart, one double spout frozen drink machine, two flavors of the customer's choice, 100 9-ounce plastic cups, and a white tent for all-day outdoor use.

The Deluxe costs $400 and includes one self-serve cart, one double spout frozen drink machine, four flavors of the customer's choice, 200 9-ounce plastic cups, and a white tent for all-day outdoor use.

## Flavor Menu
Fruity Favorites are Banana, Blue Raspberry, Cherry Bomb, Green Apple, Mango, Orange, Peach, Strawberry, Strawberry Banana, and Watermelon.

Tropical Escapes are Blue Hawaiian, Goombay Smash, Mai Tai, Pina Colada, Rum Runner, and Tropical Knockout.

Cocktail Classics are Feeling No Pain, Frose, Hurricane, Liquid Mary, Margarita, and Sangria.

Summer Refreshers include Summertime Lemonade.

Popular combos are Strawberry + Pina Colada, Mango + Margarita, Peach + Hurricane, and Blue Raspberry + Watermelon.

## Booking Flow
The website has Book & Pay buttons for each rental. Clicking one opens the Bayou Sips booking calendar (powered by Cal.com), where customers pick an available event date, share their phone number, event address, event type, guest count, flavor choices, and any notes, then pay the full rental amount upfront through Stripe to confirm. A confirmation email is sent instantly. A $50 portion of every booking is held as a non-refundable deposit to secure the date; it is part of the rental amount, not an additional charge.

## Direct Booking URLs
The three rental options each have a dedicated Cal.com event-type page that can be linked or shared directly:
- The Mini ($175): https://cal.com/bayou.sips1/bayou-sips-the-mini
- The Original ($250): https://cal.com/bayou.sips1/bayou-sips-the-original
- The Deluxe ($400): https://cal.com/bayou.sips1/bayou-sips-the-deluxe

All three event types use the same Cal.com username (bayou.sips1), the same Stripe-backed full-payment-upfront flow, and the same instant email confirmation.

## What Customers Provide at Booking
At checkout the customer provides their event date and start time, event type (wedding, birthday, shower, graduation, corporate event, cookout, etc.), approximate guest count, flavor picks from the menu (1 for The Mini, 2 for The Original, 4 for The Deluxe), event address for delivery and setup, and a working phone number for day-of coordination.

## Booking Policy
A $50 portion of every booking is held as a non-refundable deposit to secure the event date. Customers are encouraged to book at least 7 days in advance. For shorter-notice events, customers can message Bayou Sips through the Facebook page and Bayou Sips will accommodate when calendar availability and logistics allow.

## Important Unknowns
The website confirms Bayou Sips is based in Ponchatoula, Louisiana and lists two co-owner phone numbers (Paula Meyers at 225-268-6647 and Baileigh Vinson at 228-334-9854), but does not list a street address, a specific service area or travel radius, delivery fees, full cancellation terms beyond the $50 non-refundable deposit, or a weather policy. Those details are confirmed by email after a booking is placed, or visitors can ask through the Bayou Sips Facebook page before booking.

## Owners and Contact
Bayou Sips is co-owned and run by Paula Meyers and Baileigh Vinson.
- Paula Meyers, Co-Owner: (225) 268-6647
- Baileigh Vinson, Co-Owner: (228) 334-9854
- Email: bayou.sips1@gmail.com
- Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61572368766729

Customers can call either owner directly for short-notice bookings, day-of coordination, or general questions.
